+------[  Group 3  ]-------+    +------[  Group 2  ]-------+    +------[  Group 1  ]-------+
|                          |    |                          |    |                          |
| +------+        +------+ |    | +------+        +------+ |    | +------+        +------+ |
| |  C2  |<-------+  C1  |<-------+  B2  |<-------+  B1  |<-------+  A2  |<-------+  A1  | |
